title: Clean, fully compliant imported Scotch Whisky (flash-glare, level 9, tilt-left)
image_prompt: Photorealistic Scotch bottle with a classy, minimalist white and silver label. Verbatim text to include exactly: 'Highland Crest', 'Scotch Whisky', '40% Alc./Vol.', '700 mL', 'Imported by Highland Crest Imports, New York, NY', 'Product of Scotland'. Include a separate paragraph in small print: 'GOVERNMENT WARNING: (1) According to the Surgeon General, women should not drink alcoholic beverages during pregnancy because of the risk of birth defects. (2) Consumption of alcoholic beverages impairs your ability to drive a car or operate machinery, and may cause health problems.'
expectedSourceBehavior: All 8 fields PASS, 0 advisories, overall PASS
visualObservation: Visual note: label photo has severe flash glare over label text. Camera orientation is tilt-left (-15 degrees).
